textByHash.f1ec14e8a74c409e56621eeeae7bfa110d05c4e7: My name is Le Sabre and I'm the task master for the Morytania Achievement Diary.
textByHash.0f58797824140a7ea54a567b8ebfd046cbd07bf2: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. Here in Morytania it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.ec045c63e01d11bb26e60aa910bf684c12c1a37c: Well, there are four different pairs of Morytania platelegs, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of
textByHash.ce7732b0bbc1d698c6e66774e7b74d0ecde75e42: rewards would you like to know more about?
textByHash.eca7b522ed1387cb8058ebfb0b23e3a21b1ffecc: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Morytania, your legs can teleport to the Slime pit beneath the Ectofuntus twice a day, there's a chance Ghasts will ignore you in the swamp, and you'll receive a 2.5%
textByHash.d5a629cd1d43ffc61d425e694cd5630a0e9db5df: increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.
textByHash.dfa2bae0b5c9b7e820d9cfc95e8b75b50913e897: In addition to the easy rewards, you get 5 daily slime pit teleports and a built-in ghostspeak amulet. Robin in Port Phasmatys will exchange some bonemeal for bones for you, and you'll receive a 5% increase in Slayer
textByHash.028f94dc549089381f7239659daff6f61a327124: XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.
textByHash.302a411227a5b9ccbffb4d46247c7e7375939a60: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you can pick double Mort Myre Fungi in the swamp, get more experience from burning shades, receive more runes from Barrows, Robin will exchange more bonemeal for
textByHash.92e28242ac66c13f380935dc4c43a5d20a5f427f: bones each day and you'll receive a 7.5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower. The disciples at the Ectofuntus will give you a bonecrusher too!
textByHash.a76df72aaf40391de47af43fa64da3cf162bd203: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, Robin will exchange even more bonemeal for bones, you'll receive a 10% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower, there's a new herb farming patch on
textByHash.a03110927907a0fd35367bc9deec8dadf9f6d4b6: Harmony Island, you'll receive 50% more experience when cremating shade remains and the experience provided by the Bonecrusher is increased too.
textByHash.630845d9c5523ae3cd934d50c05d6791759f3ad9: Just complete the tasks in Morytania so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHash.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHash.6cac27e0d8e9827332ff0db56cf9ad1df5191ddb: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.
textByHash.abe2feb9606297d49cfdc2100d76be22cd819325: These platelegs are a symbol of your exploration of Morytania. You can use them to teleport to the Slime pit beneath the Ectofuntus twice a day, there's a chance Ghasts will ignore you in the swamp, and you'll receive
textByHash.5971643207af4e973dcb5ce7bda7266fbd016d8b: a 2.5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.
textByHash.e472060af70f47da4afff7c28180c5f683879c39: If you ever lose them, come back to me to reclaim them.
textByHash.389961028a99a13a6f760ff478f6cce609629e81: I've upgraded your Morytania legs for you. They've now got 5 daily slime pit teleports and a built-in ghostspeak amulet. Robin in Port Phasmatys will exchange some bonemeal for bones for you, and you'll
textByHash.eb43f15d71c0486f5bb667b7e8b983cd826c50e7: receive a 5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower too.
textByHash.6c19cd19ea1ca88aa3d783be27a41fc0e23a0823: I've upgraded your Morytania legs for you. You can now pick double Mort Myre Fungi in the swamp, get more experience from burning shades, receive more runes from Barrows, Robin will exchange more
textByHash.50f08bafebc9225643b54cdaf4acb20dcb5d282e: bonemeal for bones each day and you'll receive a 7.5% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower. The disciples at the Ectofuntus have something for you too.
textByHash.bb85918f88b16c8822656f078cc6cb061013efbd: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in Morytania! Here's your reward!
textByHash.abd4376d3967fd35cec76364ae2dc8abe650dde9: I've upgraded your Morytania legs for you. Robin will exchange even more bonemeal for bones, you'll receive a 10% increase in Slayer XP when on assignment in the Slayer Tower, there's a new herb farming patch on
textByHash.6856e1e01a6095928f17c0bb9edd6eb7b67cf4f9: Harmony Island, you'll receive 50% more experience when cremating shade remains and the experience provided by the Bonecrusher has been increased too.
